__inputs.name: DS_POSTGRESQL
__inputs.label: PostgreSQL
__inputs.description: Postgres datasource pointing to the quasi senate_telemetry table

description: Provider-level benchmarking for the QUASI Senate Loop — latency, pass rate, retry rate, and model substitution tracking across OpenRouter, Groq, HuggingFace, Fireworks, and other providers.

panels.title: Cycles Today

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cycle_id) AS value FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '24 hours' AND dry_run = false

panels.description:
Number of complete senate cycles executed today.

**Source:** Distinct `cycle_id` values in `senate_telemetry` for the current day.

panels.title: Pass Rate (24h)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved', 'approve', 'success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '24 hours' AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL

panels.description:
24-hour pass rate gauge — percentage of calls with a successful outcome.

Green (>80%), yellow (60-80%), red (<60%).

panels.title: Median Latency (24h)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '24 hours' AND dry_run = false AND error IS NULL

panels.description:
Median response latency across all providers in the last 24 hours.

**Formula:** `PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) / 1000`

panels.title: Model Substitution Rate

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified = false THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND provider = 'openrouter' AND model_verified IS NOT NULL AND dry_run = false

panels.description:
Rate of model substitutions — how often providers serve a different model than requested.

**Source:** `model_verified = false` or `served_model != model_string`

Higher rates indicate provider routing issues.

panels.title: Pass Rate by Provider × Base Model

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model, provider, role,
       COUNT(*) AS n,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved', 'approve', 'success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)) AS avg_latency_ms,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS json_ok_pct
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY base_model, provider, role
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY base_model, role, pass_rate_pct DESC

panels.description:
Pass rate breakdown by provider and base model.

Reveals which provider×model combinations are most/least reliable.

panels.title: Latency Distribution by Provider

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp,$__interval),
  provider,
  AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND error IS NULL
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.description:
Latency distribution over time per provider.

Use this to spot provider outages, congestion windows, or latency regressions.

panels.title: Retry & Error Rate by Provider

targets.rawSql:
SELECT provider,
       COUNT(*) AS total_calls,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN retries > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS retry_pct,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN error IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS error_pct,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = false THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS json_fail_pct
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY total_calls DESC

panels.description:
Retry and HTTP error rates per provider.

High retry rates indicate API instability. High error rates may indicate rate limiting or authentication issues.

panels.title: OpenRouter Model Substitution Log

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, model_id, model_string, served_model, model_verified
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND provider = 'openrouter'
  AND (model_verified = false OR (served_model IS NOT NULL AND served_model != model_string))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.description:
Log of OpenRouter model substitutions.

**Detection:** `model_verified = false` OR `served_model IS NOT NULL AND served_model != model_string`

OpenRouter routes across backends and may silently swap models under load.

panels.title: Provider Architecture Comparison

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN provider IN ('groq', 'cerebras') THEN 'custom_silicon'
        WHEN provider IN ('fireworks', 'together') THEN 'optimized_gpu'
        WHEN provider = 'deepinfra' THEN 'standard_gpu'
        WHEN provider = 'openrouter' THEN 'aggregator'
        WHEN provider = 'huggingface' THEN 'aggregator'
        WHEN provider = 'mistral' THEN 'model_native'
        WHEN provider = 'sarvam' THEN 'model_native'
        ELSE 'other'
    END AS architecture,
    provider,
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)) AS avg_latency_ms,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms)) AS p95_latency_ms,
    ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 1) AS json_ok_pct
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY architecture, provider
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY architecture, pass_rate_pct DESC

panels.description:
Provider architecture classification.

**Categories:**
- `model_native`: Direct provider (Groq, Cerebras, Mistral) — own hardware
- `routing_layer`: Aggregator (OpenRouter, DeepInfra) — routes to backends
- `inference_api`: Hosted inference (HuggingFace, Together, Fireworks)

title: QUASI Senate — Provider Benchmark
